author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو بكر عبد الله بن محمد بن عبيد بن سفيان بن قيس البغدادي الأموي القرشي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and author of numerous works on ethics, spirituality, and hadith.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Part of the broader tradition of compiling hadith on specific themes, particularly those related to moral and social conduct.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Contributes to the understanding of Islamic ethics and the obligation of enjoining good and forbidding evil, a central theme in Islamic thought.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Salah bin Ayadh al-Shalahi is known for his careful editing and verification of classical Islamic texts.
